findings.detail: 15 template chips may feel like a lot to scan at once
findings.proposed_solution: Group templates into clearer categories so I can pick faster

findings.detail: Palette choices are only 3, which can feel a bit limited if I want a different mood
findings.proposed_solution: Show a simple preview of each palette so I can choose by look, not just name

findings.detail: The chat input accepted my text, but it wasn’t clear what happened after I sent it
findings.proposed_solution: After I send a chat message, show an obvious confirmation or next step

warnings.detail: 15 template chips may feel like a lot to scan at once
